mxCell.value: Cloud-Edge Collaborative AI Agent Architecture for Campus Services

Coze Agent (Cloud)
• Intent understanding
• Task planning
• Workflow scheduling

Secure Communication Tunnel
VPN + HTTPS + mTLS

Local Agent Runtime
RESTful WebAPI | API-key Authentication | Whitelist Sandbox

Skill Engine (Local)
Registration | Scheduling | Execution | Response Packaging

Data Localization
Sensitive data remains on-premise
Bot API

Cloud Policy
• No sensitive data storage
• No direct access to campus resources
• Decision and orchestration only

Cloud Capabilities
• Conversation management
• Workflow orchestration
• Skill invocation
• Monitoring and logging
